name: f5-followup-per-turn-timing
title: F5 follow-up: per-turn latency + thinking timing for multi-turn agent responses
description:
Fix the known limitation where multi-turn agent-loop responses (thinking → tool_use → tool_result → ... → text) only persist latency / thinking_ms on the LAST assistant message. First N-1 messages' ttfb_ms / gen_ms / total_ms / thinking_ms columns stay NULL because the agent loop's deferred `Done` event fires once per request (not per turn) and `RequestState.thinkingDurationMs` is closed on the first non-thinking boundary. Symptom: ThinkingBlock header shows '—' for the first N-1 messages, and the last message shows the FIRST thinking phase's duration (not the last). See .trellis/spec/backend/llm-contract.md 'Known Limitations (F5 — 2026-06-12 follow-up)' for the full root cause + fix scope.

Resolution: 4-commit implementation (spec-only → Rust agent loop → frontend RequestState+re-attach → test+ADR) + chore journal. New ChatEvent::TurnComplete variant carrying per-turn seq + 4 nullable ms. persist_turn now writes the 4-column MessageLatency on the assistant row INSERT (was None → columns stayed NULL for N-1 turns). RequestState: Map<turnIndex, TurnLatency> replaces per-request single-value latencyPending/thinkingDurationMs. reloadAfterFinalize iterates latencyByTurn and fires N update_message_latency IPCs (per-seq, not per-request 'max seq'). chat.ts accumulateLatency moves to per-turn (matches A4 accumulateTokenUsage per-done pattern). Plan revisions: removed RequestState.thinkingStartedAt/thinkingDurationMs + 4 close boundaries (backend TurnComplete payload now carries thinking_ms from per-turn Instant pair); removed case 'done' last.latency write (avoid overwriting backend-precise value with frontend Date.now()). 92/92 vitest + 319/319 cargo + vue-tsc clean. Verified by 3-turn per-turn test + 4-column 3-turn INSERT test.
creator: Carlos
estimated_complexity: L (80-100 lines across 7 files; PRD estimated 30-50 which was low)
notes: PR revision: 1) removed RequestState.thinkingStartedAt/thinkingDurationMs and the 4 close boundaries (backend TurnComplete payload now carries thinking_ms from per-turn turn_thinking_done - turn_thinking_start Instant pair); 2) removed case 'done' last.latency write (avoid overwriting backend-precise value with frontend Date.now()). Both revisions written into ADR at docs/IMPLEMENTATION.md §4. 6 PRD line numbers were off — see commit 3 message's 'Plan revision' section.
